description: Support all NBK currency pairs across settings, transaction rows, and balances with full-source fallback and auto pair reset after repeated fetch failures.

userStories.title: Generalize exchange-rate domain contracts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want exchange-rate domain contracts to support full NBK quote sets so the app can convert between any supported currencies instead of only USD/KZT.
acceptanceCriteria: Domain exchange-rate model stores normalized multi-currency quotes (code -> KZT per 1 unit) with fetchedAt metadata, not only usdToKzt
ExchangeRateRepository contract exposes observe/fetch APIs for the full quote set and no longer forces USD/KZT-only naming
Conversion use case accepts source currency, target currency, and amount, and supports deterministic same-currency passthrough
All call sites compile against the new domain API without temporary TODO stubs
CI checks for this story commit pass on GitHub Actions
userStories.notes: Primary files: domain/exchangerate/src/main/java/com/atelbay/money_manager/domain/exchangerate/model/ExchangeRate.kt, .../repository/ExchangeRateRepository.kt, .../usecase/*. Keep conversion deterministic via KZT pivot (source->KZT->target) and preserve rounding strategy already used in ConvertAmountUseCase tests.

userStories.title: Fetch and cache full NBK quotes
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to download all daily NBK currency quotes so every supported pair can be converted with current rates.
acceptanceCriteria: NBK remote data source parses all available currency rows (code + nominal + KZT value), not only USD
Parser normalizes nominal-based rows (e.g., 10/100 units) to per-1-unit KZT rates before storing
Repository persists the full quote set in UserPreferences and returns cached quotes if refresh fails
Quote metadata (source and fetchedAt) remains available for Settings UI
Backward-compatible read path exists for legacy usd_kzt cache values during migration window
CI checks for this story commit pass on GitHub Actions

userStories.title: Auto-switch pair after 3 fetch failures
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to recover from repeated quote refresh failures by resetting the selected pair to the most used transaction currencies.
acceptanceCriteria: Consecutive quote-refresh failures are tracked in persistent preferences
Failure counter increments on each failed refresh and resets to 0 after any successful refresh
When counter reaches 3, app auto-selects settings pair from all-time transactions: base=top-1 currency by transaction count, target=top-2 currency by transaction count
If top-1 is unavailable fallback base is USD; if top-2 is unavailable fallback target is EUR
Tie handling for top-1/top-2 is deterministic and documented in code comments
Auto-switch updates persisted base/target settings without crash
CI checks for this story commit pass on GitHub Actions
userStories.notes: Use all transactions history (no period filter) for frequency ranking. Likely touchpoints: exchange-rate refresh flow + preferences + transaction repository/use case access for counts.

userStories.title: Display dynamic pair rate in settings
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Settings exchange-rate block to reflect my selected base/target currencies so pair info is correct beyond USD/KZT.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings rate title/subtitle no longer hardcode USD/KZT and are derived from currently selected base and target currencies
Rate display is calculated from the generalized quote set for any selected pair (including non-USD and non-KZT pairs)
After auto-switch on 3 failures, settings currency summary updates to the new persisted pair
Refresh action and error state remain pair-agnostic and do not break manual currency selection
CI checks for this story commit pass on GitHub Actions
userStories.notes: Primary files: presentation/settings/.../SettingsViewModel.kt, SettingsState.kt, SettingsScreen.kt. Keep existing test tags stable where possible (settings:exchangeRate, settings:refreshRateAction, settings:currencySummary).

userStories.title: Apply all-pair conversion with full fallback
userStories.description: As a user, I want transaction rows and balance/summary cards to convert correctly for any selected currency while safely falling back to source values when rates are insufficient.
acceptanceCriteria: TransactionListViewModel converts account balances, income, expense, and row amounts for any NBK-supported source/base combination
When conversion is applied, row primary amount uses selected display currency and secondary line keeps original amount + original currency with 'Исх.' label
Full fallback rule is enforced: if required quotes are missing for current scope, UI falls back to source values/currencies instead of partial mixed conversion
Same-currency rows and totals keep current behavior without redundant conversion rendering
Selected currency is displayed consistently in balance widgets and transaction list where conversion is available
CI checks for this story commit pass on GitHub Actions
userStories.notes: Primary files: presentation/transactions/.../TransactionListViewModel.kt, TransactionListState.kt, TransactionListScreen.kt, core/ui/.../TransactionListItem.kt. Reuse current row-level conversion UX added in branch history; expand conversion matrix and fallback policy.

userStories.title: Add regression tests for multi-currency policy
userStories.description: As a developer, I want automated coverage for generalized conversion, full fallback, and auto-reset policy so USD/KZT-only regressions do not return.
acceptanceCriteria: Domain conversion tests cover same-currency passthrough, inverse pair conversion, and nominal-based currencies
Repository/data tests cover parsing multiple NBK quotes, nominal normalization, and cached fallback on remote failure
Failure-streak tests cover increment/reset behavior and the 3-failure auto-switch to top-1/top-2 (with USD/EUR defaults)
TransactionListViewModel tests cover at least one non-USD base scenario and full-source fallback when quotes are missing
CI checks for this story commit pass on GitHub Actions
userStories.notes: Primary files: domain/exchangerate/src/test/... , data/exchangerate/src/test/... , presentation/transactions/src/test/... . Follow existing fake-repository and coroutine-test style used in TransactionListViewModelTest and ConvertAmountUseCaseTest.
